letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice crestline-202605

To the Billing Department, Crestline Office Supplies:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice crestline-202605, covering the
billing period 2026-05-01 through 2026-05-31.

Per the governing clause (MSA §4.1):

    "Customer shall pay a monthly subscription base fee of $250.00."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $1,330.00.
The invoice as billed totals $1,380.00, a discrepancy of $50.00.

Calculation:
  - Flat fee: expected 250.00, billed 300.00 (overcharge of 50.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $50.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Customer shall pay a monthly subscription base fee of $250.00.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 50.00.
